name: NMB48
description: '''NMB48''' (read "N.M.B. Forty-eight") is a [[Japanese idol]] group that debuted in 2011 as the second sister group to [[AKB48]], produced by [[Yasushi Akimoto]]. NMB48 is named after the [[Namba]] district in [[Osaka]] city of [[Osaka Prefecture]], where the group is based. The group performs at the NMB48 Theater, which is located in the basement of the Yes-Namba Building in [[Namba]], [[Osaka]]. The group has sold over 9 million CDs in Japan.
